There are n bins and we are going to throw balls into them one by one randomly and independently. Assuming the bins have unlimited capacity. What is the expected number of balls to be thrown so that no bin is empty?

一定掉得入其中一個桶？

n bins, k balls
每次拋一個ball
每個ball必定入到其中一個bin
咁expect要拋幾多個ball先可以令每個bin至少有1個ball

k一定要至少 = n
